heading: Midshipmen’s store, trade shops, dairy, and laundry: nonappropriated fund instrumentality and accounts
label: 8471 Midshipmen’s store, trade shops, dairy, and laundry: nonappropriated fund instrumentality and accounts
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)6971(a)(less last proviso).34 U.S.C. 1108b(less last proviso), .July 26, 1946, ch. 675, § 260 Stat. 7046971(b).34 U.S.C. 1106, .Aug. 5, 1939, ch. 448, § 153 Stat. 1210In subsection (a) the second listing of the activities is omitted for brevity.In subsection (b) the words “including midshipmen” are omitted as surplusage. The words “are available for the maintenance of” are substituted for the words “are appropriated for the purpose of providing and maintaining”.

Amendments2018— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 115–232section 6971 of this title1997—Subsec. (b)(5). inserted “(if any)” before period at end.Pub. L. 105–851996— substituted “trade shops, dairy, and laundry: nonappropriated fund instrumentality and accounts” for “laundry, barber shop, cobbler shop, tailor shop, and dairy: disposition of funds” in section catchline and amended text generally. Prior to amendment, text consisted of one undesignated par. providing for deposit and expenditure of funds from operation of midshipmen’s store, including barber shop, cobbler shop, and tailor shop at Naval Academy, Academy dairy, and Academy laundry.Pub. L. 104–2011994— struck out “(a)” before “Funds collected from the operation of the midshipmen’s”, substituted “the Academy dairy, and the Academy laundry” for “and the Academy dairy”, and struck out subsec. (b) which read as follows: “Funds collected from the operation of the Academy laundry shall be accounted for as public funds and are available for the maintenance of necessary laundry service for Academy activities and personnel.”Pub. L. 103–3371966—Subsec. (a). substituted “person designated by the Secretary of the Navy under ” for “Bureau of Supplies and Accounts”.Pub. L. 89–718section 6970(b) of this title

Effective Date of 2018 AmendmentAmendment by effective , with provision for the coordination of amendments and special rule for certain redesignations, see , set out as a note preceding .Pub. L. 115–232section 800 of Pub. L. 115–232section 3001 of this titleFeb. 1, 2019

Effective Date of 1996 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Pub. L. 104–201section 370(e) of Pub. L. 104–201section 2105 of Title 5Oct. 1, 1996

children.heading: .—Operation as Nonappropriated Fund Instrumentality
children.label: a .—Operation as Nonappropriated Fund Instrumentality
children.text: The Superintendent of the Naval Academy shall operate the Naval Academy activities referred to in subsection (b) as a nonappropriated fund instrumentality under the jurisdiction of the Navy.

children.heading: .—Nonappropriated Fund Accounts
children.label: c .—Nonappropriated Fund Accounts
children.text: The Superintendent of the Naval Academy shall administer a separate nonappropriated fund account for each of the Naval Academy activities included in the nonappropriated fund instrumentality required under subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Crediting of Revenue
children.label: d .—Crediting of Revenue
children.text: The Superintendent shall credit all revenue received from a Naval Academy activity referred to in subsection (b) to the account administered with respect to that activity under subsection (c), and amounts so credited shall be available for operating expenses of that activity.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: e .—Regulations
children.text: This section shall be carried out under regulations prescribed by the Secretary of the Navy.
